title: Hotel Hub
intro: Show Room Service, Bar, Spa and custom sections to guests — without duplicating dishes from the restaurant menu.
loginRequired: Sign in to manage Hotel Hub.
enableHelp: When disabled — Hotel Hub is hidden in Live Menu. When enabled — guests will see a tab next to the restaurant menu.

errors.infoSectionMigration: Could not add the “Hotel information” section. Run the supabase/hotel_hub_info_section.sql migration in Supabase SQL Editor.
errors.planRequired: Hotel Hub requires a Trial or Premium plan.
errors.addInfoSectionFailed: Could not add the section. Run the supabase/hotel_hub_info_section.sql migration in Supabase SQL Editor and try again.
errors.assignmentSaveFailed: Could not save Hotel Hub assignments. Make sure you ran the supabase/hotel_hub.sql migration in Supabase SQL Editor.

infoSection.missingBannerAfter: — add it so guests can see hotel contact details and hours.

sections.title: Sections
sections.namePlaceholder: e.g. Pool Bar, Wellness, Mini Bar
sections.iconHelp: Hotel icon — shared across all sections
sections.deleteConfirm: Delete this section along with its categories and assignments?
sections.assignHint: Assign dishes to this section in Digital Menu — Hotel Hub column.
sections.empty: No sections — re-enable Hotel Hub or add a custom section.

serviceNoteTemplates.1: Full restaurant menu during the day. Limited menu during late-night hours.

upsell.afterPlans: plans. On Start and free plans you can use the restaurant menu.

infoFields.attractionsHelp: Add places with a Google Maps link (optional — without a link we search by name).
